fields.label: Select Post Type
fields.name: saveToPostType
fields.instructions: The post type from which the fields should be retrieved; this setting also determines which post type the submission will be saved to.

fields.label: Add Form Step
fields.name: formSteps
fields.instructions: Add the steps that should be displayed in this form. A maximum of 9 steps is allowed.

sub_fields.label: Form Step Title
sub_fields.name: formStepTitle
sub_fields.instructions: By leaving this blank, the configuration of the fieldgroup will be used.

sub_fields.label: From Step Content
sub_fields.name: formStepContent
sub_fields.instructions: By leaving this blank, the configuration of the fieldgroup will be used.

fields.label: Submit to
fields.name: activeHandlers
fields.instructions: Select where you want the submissions to be stored or sent to.

fields.label: Data Protection Information
fields.message: <mark>Some of the selected options to send to will receive all data submitted through the form, including any sensitive information that you may collection. Please ensure that the connected services complies with all relevant data protection regulations, such as GDPR and Schrems II.</mark>

fields.label: Database
fields.name: WpDbHandlerConfig
fields.instructions: Select where we should store the answers on this form, and with what default status.

sub_fields.label: Save as Post Status
sub_fields.name: saveToPostTypeStatus
sub_fields.instructions: The post status to use when a form hasen't been reviewed by the user.

fields.label: Email
fields.name: MailHandlerConfig
fields.instructions: Configure the email adresses that should recive the form submission automatically.

fields.label: Webhook
fields.name: WebHookHandlerConfig
fields.instructions: Configure a web adress that can recive post data.

fields.label: Public Access
fields.name: isPublicForm
fields.message: This form may be used by unauthenticated visitors

fields.label: Why are we collecting this data?
fields.name: dataProcessingCategories
fields.instructions: Describe why we need to collect this data.

fields.label: Who will process or have access to the data?
fields.name: dataProcessingProcessors
fields.instructions: List all entities that will access or process the data, including internal departments as well as any external system providers.

fields.label: For how long should we keep the data submitted in this form?
fields.name: dataProcessingRetentionTime
fields.instructions: What is the maximum retention period for the data before it is deleted? This function will delete the information completly.
